known_systems.name: ERP
known_systems.role: system of record for stock, purchasing, and orders

known_systems.name: branch reorder spreadsheets
known_systems.notes: one per branch, maintained manually, not integrated with the ERP

records_source_of_truth.notes: Nominally the ERP, but staff trust physical counts more, and branches rely on their own spreadsheets for reordering.

integrations.description: Branch spreadsheets are reconciled to the ERP by manual re-keying

manual_workarounds.description: Branches maintain separate reorder spreadsheets because they do not trust ERP availability figures

data_quality_concerns.description: On-hand balances diverge from physical counts across many SKUs
Negative on-hand balances are not flagged or prevented by the ERP

access_status.notes: ERP read access requested and pending IT approval; branch spreadsheets restricted pending management sign-off.

consultant_notes: Multiple competing sources of truth is a core theme; confirm once ERP export is available.
